characters.name: Dominatrix
characters.description: The Dominatrix is a villainess who appears inDomin-a-Dead. She is a beautiful and evil woman with a black latex bodysuit, black latex long gloves and black latex long boots.

characters.name: Sylvia
characters.description: Sylvia is a character who appears inA Turn For The Purse. She is a beautiful woman with long, yellow hair, wearing a red minidress and shiny black latex thigh-high boots.
